title: Soul Seeker
description: An entity from abyss who wants your soul (Horror, not a dweller)
body:
# Abyss is calling your soul



## This mod is on beta stage, so it can be buggy.


He is watching you everywere. He sees every your step. 

Mod aims to make your gameplay scarier, by adding entity, who will stalk you everywere and try to scare you in various sohpisticated ways. Events happen frequently, but it may take you several hours to see all of them.

Mod contains screamers and loud sounds
You can configure mod using command /ss_config
You can see all commands using command /ss_command_list
Mod can grief your house (a bit)

8 random events

9 main events

3 stalk events

1 entity

This mod can be buggy in multiplayer



He will come


## GECKOLIB IS NEEDED
